title: What CJ Sees
content: A highly-visual, minimalist portfolio that tells a story through design, light, and perspective.
features: Hero animation section with Framer Motion
Hover interactions for color hex codes and metadata
Next.js dynamic routes for gallery images
lessons: Prioritizing design principles: whitespace, contrast, and motion
caption: Gallery showcase with motion and metadata

title: BullBrief
description: Investment analytics for the modern day investor.
content: BullBrief helps beginner and advanced investors summarize their holdings, and other stocks with AI-powered insights.
caption: Soon to launch — invest smarter

title: CampusPass
content: CampusPass simplifies third party ticket transactions from student to student in college campuses. Verify with a .edu email and buy, sell, and trade your tickets to other students.
caption: Soon to launch — smarter ticketing for students
